prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to police firearms operations as reported by the Home Office, which primarily oversees law enforcement in England and Wales. Policing in Scotland is managed separately through the Scottish Police Authority, making this document inapplicable to Scotland.
